title: ResolveResourcesSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``resolve-resources`` composite primitive (WS5 #5).

Collapses ``hpc-submit`` SKILL.md Step 6's silent multi-step resource
resolution — runtime-prior walltime + cluster gpu default + partition —
into one CLI call. Each of ``walltime_sec`` / ``gpu_type`` / ``partition``
resolves from a caller override first, then an auto-resolution rule.

The ``walltime_sec`` auto-path probes the OPTIONAL ``read-runtime-prior``
verb (p95 × safety_mult). That verb is plugin-only: on a core install it
is not registered, and the first submit has no prior. A missing/erroring
verb, or one reporting ``needs_canary``, is cold-start — ``walltime_sec``
stays null (the caller falls back to the cluster cold-start walltime),
NOT an error. Partition resolution delegates to the existing
``recommend-partition`` primitive; partition logic is not reimplemented.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Cluster name. Keys the gpu_type default (clusters.<cluster>.gpu_types[0]) and the read-runtime-prior lookup.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Experiment directory (default cwd). Forwarded to the read-runtime-prior probe and to recommend-partition.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Run profile (run_name) — the read-runtime-prior lookup key. When null, the walltime probe is skipped and walltime resolves cold-start (``cold_start_no_profile``).

cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha
cmd_sha.description: Optional cmd_sha to filter the runtime prior to this exact code version. Omit to use the profile-wide prior.

walltime_sec.title: Walltime Sec
walltime_sec.description: Caller override for walltime_sec (seconds). When supplied, the read-runtime-prior probe is skipped entirely and provenance is ``caller``.

gpu_type.title: Gpu Type
gpu_type.description: Caller override for gpu_type. When supplied, the clusters.<cluster>.gpu_types[0] default is skipped and provenance is ``caller``.

safety_mult.title: Safety Mult
safety_mult.description: Multiplier applied to the runtime-prior p95 to size walltime (default 1.30 = 30% headroom over historical p95). Only used on the auto-resolve path.

partition.title: Partition
partition.description: Caller override for partition. When supplied, recommend-partition is skipped and provenance is ``caller``.

user_preferred_partition.title: User Preferred Partition
user_preferred_partition.description: Soft partition preference forwarded to recommend-partition (honoured verbatim when it names a declared partition). Distinct from ``partition``, which is a hard override that skips recommend-partition.
